class.name: CSVIndex
class.brief_description: Lookup index for CSV table rows.
class.description: CSVIndex stores a column-based lookup table built by [method CSVTable.build_index]. It supports fast single-row and multi-row lookups and can report duplicate keys when built in unique mode.

method.name: duplicate_keys
method.description: Returns keys that appeared more than once when the index was built in unique mode.

method.name: get_row
method.description: Returns the first row for [param value], or [code]null[/code] when no row matches.

method.name: has
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if at least one row matches [param value].

method.name: is_unique
method.description: Returns whether the index was built in unique mode.
